title: Dry Bulk Shipping - January 8, 2019
summary: 2019 starts on a high note - Historically, the first quarter has generally been weaker compared to the rest Iron ore volumes to increase marginally in 2019 - We expect iron ore exports out of Brazil to grow about IMO 2020 regulations should lead to tighter balance - In the next 12 months, a large number for dry bulk Short term positive - We believe Capesize rates can remain strong, and further advance, in the near term, Long term neutral - Slower economic growth and the maturing nature of the Chinese economy when it
